title: FintechAIGuardScenario
description: Canonical shape for every hand-authored scenario in scenarios/**/*.yaml (categories 1-9 of the risk taxonomy; see docs/test-strategy.md). Category 10, Authorization & Access Boundaries, is redteam-plugin driven and out of scope for this schema. Top level mirrors promptfoo's native test-case fields (description, vars) so files load directly via `tests: file://scenarios/**/*.yaml` with no transform step.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this scenario tests and why. promptfoo's native per-test description field.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. Convention: <category>-<short-slug>-<3-digit-seq>, e.g. hallucination-fabricated-payee-001.

category.description: Primary risk-taxonomy category (docs/test-strategy.md). Matches the scenario's parent directory under scenarios/.

subcategory.description: Required only when category is 'injection'; matches scenarios/injection/{direct,document-embedded}/.

severity.description: See severity scale in docs/test-strategy.md. Drives release-gating behavior.

input.description: Primary content interpolated into the prompt template — the chat message, document text, or transaction payload under test.

context.description: Auxiliary structured data available to the prompt and to assertions but not the primary input under test (e.g. prior-transaction records for idempotency, schema_file pointer for schema-compliance, account balance for limit checks).

schema_file.description: Repo-relative path to a JSON Schema under scenarios/schema/, consumed by assertions/schema_validator.py.

expected_behavior.description: Ground-truth description of correct model behavior. For rubric-graded categories (tone-disclosure), phrase as explicit grading criteria, not narrative — see docs/test-strategy.md.

forbidden_patterns.description: Regex or literal substrings that must NOT appear in model output (e.g. unmasked PAN pattern, executed-injection markers).

required_fields.description: Dot-path field names that MUST be present and non-null in structured output.

regulatory_ref.description: Citation of the relevant regulation/standard clause, e.g. 'PCI-DSS v4.0 Req 3.3.1'. Null when no direct regulatory tie. Feeds docs/compliance-mapping.md (Sprint 7).
